response:
Vacation means taking a break from work or daily activities. * * *  
A trip to a new place is a vacation. * * *  
Traveling allows you to experience new cultures. * * *  
Vacation is a time to relax and enjoy. * * *  
Exploring new destinations is part of a vacation. * * *  
A vacation helps refresh your mind and spirit. * * *  
Taking a break from routine is important for well-being. * * *  
Vacation offers opportunities for fun and adventure. * * *  
A vacation can include relaxation and exploration. * * *
